---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<!-- [Download PDF](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary} -->

---

## Education

**PhD in Computer Science** — XYZ University *(2021 – present)*  
Thesis: *"Title of my thesis"*

**MSc in Data Science** — ABC University *(2019 – 2021)*

---

## Experience

**Research Intern** — Google DeepMind *(Summer 2023)*  
Description of what you did.

---

## Skills

| Category | Tools |
|---|---|
| Languages | Python, R, Julia |
| Frameworks | PyTorch, HuggingFace |
| Tools | Git, Docker, Quarto |

---

## Publications

See [Research](research.qmd) page.
